notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. hit by pitch. Myles Straw to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez pops out to third baseman Caleb Durbin.

notableEvents.label: Davis Schneider GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Davis Schneider grounds into a double play, pitcher Ryan Watson to shortstop Trevor Story to first baseman Willson Contreras. Daulton Varsho out at 2nd. Davis Schneider out at 1st.
